name: Sopa De Frijol Negro (Black Bean Soup)
recipeIngredient: ½ cup Coarsely chopped scallions, including green tops
¼ tsp Freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Pick over the beans and rinse them. Place in a large heavy pot with water.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil quickly. Stir then remove from heat. Let sit for 1 hour.
3. When softened, return to heat. Add remaining ingredients except rum. Cook, covered, on low heat until beans are very tender and ham falls off bone (several hours).
4. Remove from heat; discard the ham hock. Press soup through a food mill. Taste and adjust seasoning. Return diced meat to soup.
5. Rest in refrigerator or serve warm. Reheat gently while stirring in rum. Serve with lemon wedges, cooked white rice, minced onion, or chopped hard-boiled eggs.
Serves 6.
